name: Calling Bird Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter with sugar; add egg and almond extract.
2. With mixer at low speed, add flour, baking powder, and orange juice. Blend well.
3. Divide dough into thirds. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill until firm (about 2 hours).
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough 1/3 at a time to 1/8 to 1/4-inch thickness.
6. Cut with 3 to 4-inch bird-shaped cookie cutters. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. In a small bowl, stir together corn syrup and water; lightly brush mixture over cookies.
8. Arrange sliced almonds to resemble wing and tail feathers.
9. Bake for 6-9 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned. Cool for 1 minute, then transfer to a cooling rack.
10. While still warm, brush with corn syrup mixture and sprinkle with granulated sugar. Makes 4 dozen cookies.
